title: Veinminer
description: This is a simple Veinminer that is designed to allow a user to break any block instead of the traditional ores or trees. This should be nicer to have when building.
body:
# Fast Veinminer

This mod was created as I couldn't find a version of Veinminer that would work for my Survival Modded World, due to this I created this. This is basically a veinminer that allows you to break any block instead of the restrictive amount of blocks some other veinminers let you do such as trees or ores.

## Configuration

Clients and Servers have the ability to configure this mod, the server will have final say over gameplay settings such as amount of blocks this effects at a time, hunger drain, range of search for blocks. This should allow users to be able to play on servers with this mod without having to worry about client configurations taking over. 

This mod works within single player as well so you can configure your settings there as well based on what you feel is fair, though I've tried to balance it a bit.

```
/veinminer 
```

You can also configure this mod through the mod menu as well and it will respect it.

## Features

- Break any block using a keybind
- Stops if your tool breaks, you run out of hunger, the maximum amount of blocks have been reached or if you let go of the keybind.
- Supports Creative Mod (If you ever build a big constraption and then mess it up like I've done way too many time, it's a lot quicker of a clean up. Blocks will not drop in creative and you do not need to hold a tool for any type of block)
- Respects enchantments in-game for example with fortune on a pickaxe it will treat all blocks broken as if the player broke it and will do the same for XP.
- Configuratable

## Issues / Requests

Feel free to reach out to this project if you have any issues or any requests additionally if the original person who came up with Veinminer wishes for this to be taken down, please let me know and I'll remove it happily.
